signatureMove.name: Corn Cutter
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Deal 2 Slicing Dmg to all models within 2" that did not participate in this round of melee. This does not count as Melee Dmg.

abilities.name: Great Sword
abilities.description: If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +3. If this character deals Impact or Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

abilities.name: Intimidate
abilities.description: Target Human or Goblin suffers -2 Arcane stat and gains [Predictable Combatant]: During a round of combat, before each player selects their combat card, you must reveal your hand to your opponent until end of turn.

abilities.name: Stand Back!
abilities.description: All other models within the pulse move 1" directly away.
